## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeIngredientBase class

Abstract base class for runtime ingredients. Provides common properties and navigation shared by all ingredient types.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare abstract class RuntimeIngredientBase implements IIngredient 
```
**Implements:** [IIngredient](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.iingredient.md)

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `RuntimeIngredientBase` class.
